description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for reading and writing 5-digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent reading and writing skills with 4-digit numbers, can fast-track to 5-digit with challenge

videoSequence.reason: Mixed practice - reading and writing together

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready, provide complete coverage of reading and writing 5-digit numbers

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in reading/writing 4-digit numbers, needs targeted review before 5-digit

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant review of reading and writing 4-digit numbers before attempting 5-digit

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with reading and writing 5-digit numbers.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: How do you read 30,050?
questions.explanation: 30,050 is read as 'Thirty thousand fifty.' The zeros in hundreds and tens places are not mentioned.

questions.question: Read: 45,678
options: Four thousand five hundred sixty-seven eight

ifAllCorrect.message: Excellent! You can read 5-digit numbers correctly.

ifAllWrong.reason: Student struggling with reading numbers aloud

questions.question: Write in digits: Fifty thousand seven
questions.explanation: Fifty thousand = 50,000; seven = 7. Total: 50,007 with zeros in hundreds, tens.

ifWrong.message: Practice writing numbers with zeros before continuing

skip_ahead.action: Skip real-world applications video, jump to challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review on reading/writing 4-digit numbers

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend practicing with parent/teacher dictating numbers to write and numbers to read aloud

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You can read and write 4-digit numbers confidently. You're ready to learn 5-digit number reading and writing. We've created a fast-track playlist with challenge content.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand reading and writing numbers. Let's extend this skill to 5-digit numbers with complete coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in reading or writing numbers. Don't worry! We'll start with targeted review videos on the concepts you need, then move to 5-digit numbers.

low_score.message: You need to review reading and writing 4-digit numbers first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation. After watching, you can retake the quiz and then learn 5-digit skills.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how reading and writing skills build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 75% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

readingAccuracy.description: % of students who can correctly read 5-digit numbers aloud

writingAccuracy.description: % of students who can correctly write 5-digit numbers from word form

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 90-100% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 80-90% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 45-50 minutes with 70-80% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (40 min) + retake + main content (20 min) = 60-70 total minutes, expected 60-75% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students reading each digit separately instead of by place value
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize breaking into thousands part and remainder part, practice saying 'thousand' between them
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students placing zeros incorrectly when writing from words
commonChallenges.solution2: Use place value chart, write each place value amount separately then combine
commonChallenges.challenge3: Students confused about when to say/skip zeros
commonChallenges.solution3: Rule: Only read zeros if they're at the end of a section (like 'thousand' but not in middle positions)
